scope: AUTH_COMPLEX quarantine repair: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (messages, mail_folders, events); Outlook is read-only in legacy (no write allow-list), so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope

excluded.reason: /me/sendMail is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/me/messages/{id}/reply is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/me/messages/{id} is a destructive/admin mutation and is not exposed as a reverse-ETL action in this bundle
